strategic_objective: Delineate the origins and impacts of near-perfect linear correlations among key feature pairs
key_checks: quantify dependency concentration and linear correlation strength for identified feature pairs
examine protocol and flow-level semantics that may explain dependencies
explore potential data processing or feature engineering steps contributing to redundancy
evaluate how these dependencies influence feature selection stability and model sensitivity
success_criteria: clear mapping of dependency sources to protocol or processing factors
recognition of redundancy patterns that could bias or destabilize downstream analysis
balanced understanding of dependency effects enabling informed feature scope decisions
router_constraints: preserve feature pairs involved in strong dependencies
preserve evidence references e13 to e22
